runTitle: Vercel Analyst drilldown recheck - close normal server empty-state observation

expertAssessments.rationale: 최신 Vercel production에서 Analyst 전체 분석 후 정상 서버(web-nginx-dc1-01)와 위험 서버(cache-redis-dc1-01) 드릴다운 모두 상세 데이터가 정상 노출됐습니다. 이전 empty-state 관찰은 최신 상태에서 재현되지 않았습니다.
동일 세션 direct fetch 기준 cache-redis-dc1-01, cache-redis-dc1-02 모두 X-Fallback-Response 없이 full data(anomaly/trend/pattern present)를 반환했습니다. 상시 폴백 상태는 확인되지 않았습니다.
Vercel Playwright MCP로 세션 재생성 후 시스템 시작, Analyst 전체 분석, 정상/위험 서버 드릴다운, direct API 확인을 같은 브라우저 컨텍스트에서 재현했습니다.

completedImprovements.title: Analyst 정상 서버 드릴다운 empty-state 의도/재현 판정
completedImprovements.evidence: QA-20260310-0086 Vercel recheck: web-nginx-dc1-01 detail UI normal, cache-redis-dc1-01 detail UI normal, direct /api/ai/intelligent-monitoring responses for cache-redis-dc1-01 and cache-redis-dc1-02 returned full data without X-Fallback-Response
completedImprovements.note: 이전 QA-20260310-0084의 empty-state 관찰은 최신 production에서 재현되지 않았고, 현재 기준 활성 결함으로 보지 않음

notes: Latest production deployment verified via Vercel MCP: dpl_2mn88CdN173gPzxioEhC5RFMNfXP, commit 009442ed7, READY/PROMOTED.
UI recheck: Analyst full analysis completed with overall status 13 normal / 1 warning / 1 critical.
Normal server drilldown passed: web-nginx-dc1-01 opened current status, one-hour prediction, and AI insights without empty-state.
Critical server drilldown passed: cache-redis-dc1-01 opened current anomaly state, prediction, and AI insights.

Direct API recheck passed: cache-redis-dc1-01 elapsed about 6589ms with x-ai-latency-ms=5978, no X-Fallback-Response, anomaly/trend/pattern all present; cache-redis-dc1-02 elapsed about 1895ms with x-ai-latency-ms=1831, no X-Fallback-Response, anomaly/trend/pattern all present.
Conclusion: analyst-normal-server-empty-state is closed as a non-reproducible transient observation, not an active production defect.
